holdings.infoBox: FTXN is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are ConocoPhillips stock at 7.56%, Chevron at 7.43%, Exxon Mobil at 7.17%, Occidental Petroleum at 5.62%, and EOG Resources at 5.55%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Oil & Gas ETF (FTXN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ US Smart Oil & Gas index. The fund tracks an index composed of 50 US oil and gas companies. Holdings are selected by liquidity and weighted based on volatility, value and growth factors. FTXN was launched on Sep 20, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: NASDAQ US Smart Oil & Gas Index

data.title: Energy & oil ETFs in focus as OPEC reaches compromise with UAE
data.text: Cinthia Murphy, Managing Editor of ETF.com, joins Yahoo Finance to discuss the phenomenal year for energy ETFs and where investors are taking out money in the ETF space. Watch the 2021 Berkshire Hatha...
